cpdt.simulator.engine.SimulatorEngine

Packages that use SimulatorEngine
Package
Description
cpdt.simulator.mqtt
Provides MQTT communication components for publishing simulated telemetry to external systems and vice versa.

  • Uses of SimulatorEngine in cpdt.simulator.mqtt

    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    DeviceStatusSubscriber(String brokerUrl, String clientId, SimulatorEngine simulatorEngine)
    Creates a new MQTT subscriber for receiving device status updates.
